metodos.codigoOriginal: Report Form SigReEvv To Print Prompt NoConsole

With ThisForm
	.poDataMgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector', ThisForm.Name)

	ThisForm.Percentual = 0

	If (.poDataMgr.pnIdconn > 0)
		=DoDefault()
	Else
		=Messagebox('Impossível Efetuar Conexăo Com o Servidor de Banco de Dados...', 0+48, 'CreateObject')
		Return .f.
	EndIf
EndWith
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Local lcTab, lcGru, lcCon, lcDtb, lnVlI, lnVlF, lnPct, llFra, llZer, lcTit, lcSub, lcCep, lnZer, lnTot

lcTab = Padr(ThisForm.getTabela.Value,  10)
lcGru = Padr(ThisForm.getGrupo.Value,   10)
lcCon = Padr(ThisForm.getConta.Value,   10)
lcDtb = Padr(ThisForm.getDTabela.Value, 30)
lnVlI = ThisForm.getValorIni.Value
lnVlF = ThisForm.getValorFin.Value
lnPct = 1 - (ThisForm.Percentual / 100)
llFra = (ThisForm.chkFranquias.Value = 1)
llZer = (ThisForm.chkZerados.Value = 1)

lcTit = ThisForm.Caption
lc... [TRUNCADO]

If (This.Value <> 4) && Se Năo Clicou em Saída
	If Empty(ThisForm.getTabela.Value)
		=Messagebox('Tabela de Desconto Inválida!!!', 0+48, '')
		ThisForm.getTabela.SetFocus
		Return 0
	EndIf

	If (ThisForm.getValorIni.Value < 0)
		=Messagebox('Faixa Inicial de Valor Inválida!!!', 0+48, '')
		ThisForm.getValorIni.SetFocus
		Return 0
	EndIf

	If (ThisForm.getValorIni.Value > ThisForm.getValorFin.Value)
		=Messagebox('Faixa Inicial de Valor Maior do Que a Final!!!', 0+48, '')
		ThisForm.getValorIni.S... [TRUNCADO]

Local loLista

If Not Empty(Padr(This.Value, 10))
	loLista = CreateObject('fwBuscaExt', ThisForm.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigOpTdz', ;
						   'crListaRemota', 'Codigos', Padr(This.Value, 10), 'Seleçăo', .t.)

	If Not loLista.plAchouRegistro
		loLista.mAddColuna('Codigos', '', 'Tabela')
		loLista.mAddColuna('Descrs',  '', 'Descriçăo')
		loLista.mAddColuna('Descos',  '9999.99', '%')
		loLista.Show()
	EndIf
	
	ThisForm.getTabela.Value  = crListaRemota.Codigos
	ThisForm.getDTabela.Value = crListaRemot... [TRUNCADO]

Local loLista

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	loLista = CreateObject('fwBuscaExt', ThisForm.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigOpTdz', ;
						   'crListaRemota', 'Codigos', This.Value, 'Seleçăo', .t.)

	If Not loLista.plAchouRegistro
		loLista.mAddColuna('Descrs',  '', 'Descriçăo')
		loLista.mAddColuna('Codigos', '', 'Tabela')
		loLista.mAddColuna('Descos',  '9999.99', '%')
		loLista.Show()
	EndIf
	
	ThisForm.getTabela.Value  = crListaRemota.Codigos
	ThisForm.getDTabela.Value = crListaRemota.Descrs
	ThisForm.P... [TRUNCADO]

Grupo = ThisForm.getGrupo.Value
If Not Empty(This.Value)
	If Not fAcessoContas(Usuar, Grupo, 'D', This.Value, ThisForm.getConta, This)
		=Messagebox('Acesso Negado!!!', 48, '')
		This.Value = ''
		This.Refresh
		ThisForm.getConta.Value = ''
		ThisForm.getConta.Refresh
	EndIf
Else
	ThisForm.getConta.Value = ''
	ThisForm.getConta.Refresh
EndIf
* Fim *********************************************************************************

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	=fAcessoContab(Usuar, 'D', This.Value, ThisForm.getGrupo, ThisForm.getDGrupo)
Else
	ThisForm.getGrupo.Value = ''	
	ThisForm.getGrupo.Refresh
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Grupo = ThisForm.getGrupo.Value
If Not Empty(This.Value)
	If Not fAcessoContas(Usuar, Grupo, 'C', This.Value, This, ThisForm.getDConta)
		=Messagebox('Acesso Negado!!!', 48, '')
		This.Value = ''
		This.Refresh
		ThisForm.getDConta.Value = ''
		ThisForm.getDConta.Refresh
		Return 0
	EndIf
Else
	ThisForm.getDConta.Value = ''
	ThisForm.getDConta.Refresh
	Return .t.
EndIf
* Fim *********************************************************************************

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	=fAcessoContab(Usuar, 'C', This.Value, ThisForm.getGrupo, ThisForm.getDGrupo)
Else
	ThisForm.getDGrupo.Value = ''	
	ThisForm.getDGrupo.Refresh
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************
